ops.title: ccx fragment sync: pipeline changed, task 95ed7a1 closed
ops.body: Closed via the layout-composition pipeline: the canonical copy is cc-skills guides/md/ccx.md alone (2026-07-09 cutover; cc-guides/fragments/ no longer exists, so the task's cmp criterion was obsolete — closed with --force). Evidence: cc-skills 1d12978b pushed, guides-fan-out.yml green, captain-hook AGENTS.md re-rendered at fragments=cc-skills@1d12978b carrying entry 12 (dependency-source flow) and the rg carve-out.
